text:
<@U047N90R8KU>,
Just an update to Business,

Below are the Impacted countries and Services
Germany - "I added items to my cart, clicked checkout, and it just kept spinning. Then it dumped me back to an empty cart"
USA - "Order failed twice, and now the cart is empty. I refreshed, but now the site is laggy"
Japan - "Got to checkout, then error 502. Tried again - cart gone"

To sum it all, we have got 240+ reports globally

To sum it all, we have got 240+ reports globally

<@U047N90R8KU>,

Team has identified below as root cause and working on the fix,
1. Yes, you are right there is a BlackCrow Group has hasked out websites
2. More number of unwanted threads are killing CPU and Memory
3. 502 / 504 badgateways from Checkout services
Team is working on fix and will provide an update once issues are fixed
